case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. VS. JOHN M REMINGTON

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT REMINGTON, JOHN M
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 66188127)

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON DEC-12-2018 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT JOHN REMINGTON'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED IN PART & GRANTED IN PART THE APPLICATION. THE COURT PARTIALLY GRANTED THE WAIVER AS TO THE FIRST APPEARANCE FILING FEE ONLY AND APPLICANT MUST PAY ALL COURT FEES AND COSTS. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: TERI L. JACKSON; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 (**GRANTED AS TO WAIVER OF FILING FEE FOR FIRST APPEARANCE ONLY. DEFENDANT MUST PAY ALL OTHER COURT FEES.**) AS TO DEFENDANT REMINGTON, JOHN M
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 62910546) (TRANSACTION ID # 62910546) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1385 SET FOR FEB-23-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF FEB-23-2021 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
